title: Noise Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Noise Global Group is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Noise Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Noise Global Group:
Noise Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Noise Global Group!
